subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that he may inhale the fragrance of Mine utterance and make mention of My verses unto the servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیجد عرف بیانی و یذکر العباد بایاتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
